evidence: Runtime demo: `npx tsx scripts/scan-comment-citations.ts` run directly against the real repo (not a mocked test) -- exit 0, valid JSON, scannedPackages covers all 7 packages/*, totalInstances 588 across totalFiles 54. Per user directive this session ('we can test the script as written. we do not need performative bureaucracy of auditing. the running of the script will serve as auditing'), verification is this direct run, not a separate adversarial-audit dispatch. Confirmed in the actual output: FEAT-006 at run-work-order-loop-tool.ts:2,6 and work-order-loop.ts:2; TASK-088 at run-work-order-loop-tool.ts:4 and work-order-loop.ts:4; DEC-0047 at run-work-order-loop-tool.ts:7; DEC-0014 at run-work-order-loop-tool.ts:9 and work-order-loop.ts:25 -- exactly the file/line locations issue-012 already cites. TASK-091, DEC-0044, DEC-0018 (also named in the acceptance criteria) are real citations but NOT in those same two files -- confirmed instead at index.ts:44 (TASK-091), call-agent-tool.ts:3 (DEC-0044), real-check-runner.ts:3,133 (DEC-0018), all still within packages/pi-agent-dispatch/src -- a discrepancy the implementing agent reported rather than silently reconciled; the task's acceptance criterion is satisfied on the id+file-membership basis its own text allows (not exact line-location for every one of the 7 ids in exactly 2 files). npm test (including the 11 new test cells in scripts/scan-comment-citations.test.ts, run via the existing test:migration glob) passed as part of the implementing agent's own commit (husky pre-commit gate), independently re-run by the orchestrator via the direct script invocation above.
